title: Do your friends like Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Do your friends like Evangelion             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Jan 15, 2009 3:39 pm Do have any friends that are fans of the series? My friends are okay with it, but they aren't nearly as interested in it as I am. What about you? (Sorry if someone already made this topic since I look four pages ago and I found nothing).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Thu Jan 15, 2009 4:38 pm Some of my friends might like select anime, but I haven't really met anybody in college that's into Eva. At least the forums help with meeting people with that interest.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 15, 2009 5:27 pm My wife watched it, and couldn't understand the way I obsessed about it; one friend had seen the first 24 episodes on one of the satellite channels, and happily borrowed the last DVD and EoE, but just took it as good SFnal entertainment; and one I lent the first DVD and he thought it "just an excuse to have giant robot fights" (clearly episode 4 went whistling overhead).

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Thu Jan 15, 2009 5:42 pm Mr. Tines wrote: My wife watched it,...

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Thu Jan 15, 2009 6:06 pm Of all the people I know (outside of my family, only my lil sis likes some anime), I am the only one who likes anime. I have a friend that has watched only Cowboy Bebop, but that's it. I am alone in my anime hobby IRL. So no, none of my friends even know what Evangelion is.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jan 15, 2009 6:10 pm My fiends all like it girlfriend likes it due to the show being good and she sees Asuka in herself due to the family matters and such..Won't go there but you get the picture. Best friends like it for the show, cosplay and I don't know..I guess the characters. My best friends girlfriend wishes to now borrow my boxset..Its like a virus, a good virus but still a virus.

[]:             Quote Post by honsou » Thu Jan 15, 2009 7:20 pm A couple of my friends have seen it. No one likes it as much as me, in fact a friend of mine constantly trolls me about me liking it so much. He actually really likes the series but he has fun trolling.

[]:             Quote Post by Guyver Spawn » Thu Jan 15, 2009 7:46 pm My 13 year old sister likes it though since she just saw it like a few days ago. She has not seen End of Evangelion yet.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Thu Jan 15, 2009 8:13 pm I've run into a few Eva fans in my time, though most people I know either don't know what Eva is or are too "out of it" regarding anime in general

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Jan 15, 2009 8:33 pm Simple. No. But I will make my girlfriend watch all of the episodes and the both movies sometime.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 15, 2009 9:43 pm The few people I've introduced it to enjoyed it. One was an idiot and had no idea wtf he just watched, and the other wasn't but still needed it to be explained to him. I also tried getting my girlfriend to watch it, and I think she watched the first 3 episodes, said she liked it, but she never got around to finishing it. But now she's annoyed with me whenever I mention anything about Rei. All because I told her I had a single Rei figure in my room.

[]:             Quote Post by Deathmask » Thu Jan 15, 2009 9:52 pm My friends don't understand it. They just thought it was depressing.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Thu Jan 15, 2009 10:02 pm That really sucks, I told my girlfriend that I want anything Asuka for my birthday, told her to check eBay. Maybe I'll have her watch one of the episodes this weekend...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jan 15, 2009 10:15 pm Just remember not to put Asuka in front of your real girlfriend. I mean sure we all wish we had a clone of that Red head but we can't all get what we want so love what you have. I guess its good having friends who like it cause they can make references and such...Such as when one said my Ice tea looked like LCL and I said "is it in you".

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 15, 2009 11:54 pm I don't have any friends that like Evangelion, they all thought it was annoying and most couldn't even finish the series. Not surprisingly, most of them have sat through plenty of other shows. My GF has watched dozens of anime with me (most recently, we finished both seasons of Honey and Clover), she thinks Eva is mindnumbingly boring. I have Asuka and Rei figures, lots of naked Ikki Tousen figures, my GF doesn't give a shit.

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Thu Jan 15, 2009 11:58 pm My girlfriend is interested in seeing it, but I really don't have enough time or patience to sit with her and watch it to helpfully explain what's going on in some scenes. Most of the anime club in my college has seen it and has a healthy respect for it, even if they don't like it. Usually when we MST3K whatever show we're watching, we'll reference Eva every episode or two. I also knew a few fangirls (who had trouble with POWER LEVELS and would talk to me about anime in front of other people) who enjoyed the show. Yeah, that's about it.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Fri Jan 16, 2009 12:01 am That's the only reason I think showing my gf Eva will be annoying. She'll be asking what's he doing? or why are they doing that? literally every 2 minutes. I will respond with just be quiet and find out but she will continue to ask.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Jan 16, 2009 1:12 pm I'm a hermit who commutes to college; I don't have any friends. Well, maybe if I try hard I can recall the existence of some I don't see very often... I have one buddy who'd been sufficiently into NGE (which he knew about before we met) to post rather prolifically at AnimeNations for a time ( "HeWhoPostsStuff" -- funny guy). I've tried playing the show to three other buddies: one didn't like it at all; one finished it and seemed to enjoy it enough; and the other saw the first half and I haven't heard from him since ( ).

[]:             Quote Post by Annihilationscape » Fri Jan 16, 2009 1:15 pm I had invited a massive group of my friends over to watch Eva, a few days a week, to share the experience. One friend in particular I was interested in discussing with. He's a bright guy, one of my best and oldest friends, and we have many good conversations... And while he was totally into Eva big time through the first 22 episodes... He is one of the disappointing few who felt there was not enough payoff at the end. Turns out he's the kind of guy who likes to have things pretty clearly explained to him... I explained that it was all in there - that everything (well, ok, ALMOST everything) you need to know is right there in plain sight, you just have to actually look. Alas. My wife liked it overall but has repeatedly said she liked it better when it was just a big robot monster of the week anime :P But the best reaction was from my best friend after watching the series and the EoE... He's a Christian guy and oftentimes doesn't swear, but upon viewing EoE, right after the notorious "One More Final: I Need You." aired, and the credits started, he sat there for about 5 seconds, realized that was IT, the END, and just said, "...Holy SHIT, that was the END?!"

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Fri Jan 16, 2009 2:14 pm I've watched it with my sister, my cousin, and a few people I'm not really friends with any more. My best friends aren't into anime at all.
summary:

My friends are okay with it, but they aren't nearly as interested in it as I am. What about you? (Sorry if someone already made this topic since I look four pages ago and I found nothing).

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star
